creator: mvalleton@seos.fr
text:
Created attachment 256377
[PATCH] [NEW PORT] mail/libopensmtpd Library for OpenSMTPd filters

This is a library for writing OpenSMTPd filters. It is currently used by filter-dkimsign, which I'm submitting in another issue.

It's my first time writing a port so I hope it's mostly alright. Upstream provides a Makefile for OpenBSD and a Makefile.gnu for Linux, but neither of them can be used directly with FreeBSD.
